block_00: Stop Loss Guide 💸 Trade Prabandhan ke 5 Niyam
block_01: Position Sizing, Risk-Reward Calculations aur Stops
block_02: 90% trader apna dhan kho dete hain…
block_03: To, aap top 10% me kaise ho sakte hain?
block_04: Yahan jokhim prabandhan ke 5 saran niyam diye gaye hain — Kamaai ko jama karne aur apekshakrit kum jokhim ke saath trade karne ke liye inhen follow karen.
block_05: Prati trade jokhim-pratiphal anupaat ki ganana karen
block_06: Dhan prabandhan ke mukhya ghatak "vaapsi" aur "jokhim" maapdand hain. We ek dusre par aashrit hain: ek uchch apekshit Vaapsi ek uchch jokhim ke saath juda hua hai, aur iske vipareet. Jyaadatar maamalon me, jokhim prati trade jama ke 1-15% ke range me bhinn hota hai.
block_13: Udaaharan ke liye, aapki jama raashi $100 hai. Fir, kum jokhim drshtikon ke maamale me, ek asset ke liye drawdown (kimat me kami) ka svikaary star $5 hai. Yadi jama ki raashi ghatakar $80 ho jaati hai, to drawdown bhi ghatakar $4 ho jayega.
block_14: Pratyek trade ke liye Stop Loss set karen
block_15: Yah niyam aksar shuruaati trader ko pareshan karta hai: kabhi-kabhi, position stop loss par band ho jaate hai, aur fir quotes sahi disha me jaate hain. SL ko surakshit star par set karne ke liye takniki vishleshan ka upyog karen. Yadi yah star ucch jokhim darshaata hai, to pravesh maatra kum karen.
block_18: Hamesha apne aap se puchhen: kya giravi rakhe gaye jokhim-pratifal anupaat ki shart ko pura karne ke liye sampatti apekshit take profit star tak badh payegi?
block_20: Udaaharan ke liye, ek niyam nirdhaarit karen: saftaah ke dauraan ek asset par do se adhik harane vale trade nahin karen.
block_21: Vaapas jitane ki koshish na karen
block_22: Nuksaan ki ganana aur niyantran kiya jaana chahiye. Yadi aapne jokhim prabandhan niyamon ka ullanghan kiya hai aur nuksaan uthaaya hai, to sabse acchha tarika unhen svikaar karna hai - unhen vaapas jitne ka prayaas karke apne jama raashi ko atirikt jokhim me na daalen.
